moments.title: World Cup Semi-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals are set to take place on July 14th and 15th, building up to the final on July 19th.

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: Who are you backing for the World Cup final? The semi-finals are this Tuesday and Wednesday! Get ready for some nail-biting football.

angles.name: Midweek Thrills
angles.copy: Your midweek just got a serious upgrade! The FIFA World Cup semi-finals are happening July 14th & 15th. Where will you be watching?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins its tournament days on July 16th at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, following practice days starting July 12th.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Stage
angles.copy: It's Major week! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale from July 16th. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Calling
angles.copy: The world's best golfers descend on Royal Birkdale this week for The 154th Open Championship. Get ready for some links magic!

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, which premiered on June 1st, continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily villa drama to the nation.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got the villa buzzing tonight? Tune in for the latest island antics.

angles.name: Summer of Love (Island)
angles.copy: We're deep into Love Island UK Season 13! Who's your favourite couple, and who do you think is heading for a 're-coupling' shock?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega Turns 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Luka's Legacy
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! Still listening to 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner' on repeat? We are!

moments.title: Richie Sambora is 67
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, legendary lead guitarist and co-songwriter for Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Richie Sambora, Bon Jovi's iconic guitarist, who turns 67 today! What's your favourite Bon Jovi riff he created?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn Turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, influential singer-songwriter and co-founder of the pioneering folk-rock band The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13th.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday on Monday to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! What's your favourite Byrds track to spin?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: The acclaimed American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, folk, and country, turns 80 on July 15th.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! What's the Linda song that always gets you?

moments.title: Luke Bryan Turns 50
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated American country music superstar and American Idol judge Luke Bryan celebrates his 50th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Country Star's Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to country king Luke Bryan this Friday! What's your favourite track from the 'American Idol' judge?

moments.title: Geezer Butler is 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the iconic bassist and primary lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, turns 77 on July 17th.

angles.name: Metal Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a thunderous Happy 77th Birthday to Black Sabbath's Geezer Butler this Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath classic featuring his legendary basslines?

moments.title: M.I.A. Turns 51
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam), known for her genre-bending hits, celebrates her 51st birthday on July 18th.

angles.name: Paper Planes & Beyond
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A. this Saturday! What's your go-to track from the innovative artist?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Are Here!
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are now on or entering their summer holidays, with dates varying by region but generally running through July and August.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: For many, the summer holidays are officially HERE! Kids across the UK are now free for weeks of fun. What are your plans?

angles.name: Holiday Mode Activated
angles.copy: Whether you're off on an adventure or enjoying a staycation, the UK summer holidays are in full swing for many! How are you making the most of it?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi, takes place from July 23rd-26th at Henham Park, Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until Latitude Festival kicks off! Who are you most excited to see – David Byrne, Teddy Swims, or Lewis Capaldi?

angles.name: Suffolk's Summer Festival
angles.copy: The countdown to Latitude is on! Henham Park is about to come alive with music, comedy, and arts from July 23rd. Grab those last-minute tickets!
